prompt: Update stale US-105 Phase 5 status text, preserve authenticated baseline acceptance, and prove Phase 6 did not start.

argv: Phases 1-5 accepted at the authenticated baseline gate
commands.observation: The initiative overview identifies accepted Phases 1-5 at the authenticated baseline gate.
The validation packet keeps Phase 6 closed.
The ordinary documentation change is whitespace-clean without an external diff driver.

cause_effect: AGENTS.md routes the task to the existing story and test matrix, so no duplicate map or cosmetic path move is needed.

The exact allowlisted argv and hardened subprocess environment admit only two no-config rg searches and one built-in Git diff check, so aliases, exec-path overrides, preprocessors, and V1 core commands cannot enter this transcript.
